title: 10 Secrets of Going Viral on YouTube (The Algorithm Hack)

scenes.voiceover: The YouTube algorithm isn't a mystery; it’s a machine. And like any machine, it has backdoors.
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic shot of a dark room with glowing blue computer servers and a YouTube logo on a screen.

scenes.voiceover: Secret number one: The Negative Hook. Stop saying 'Welcome to my channel.' Start saying 'You are doing this wrong.'
scenes.visual_prompt: Split screen: A sad creator with 0 views vs. a shocked creator with 1M views and a red 'X' over the 0.
